title: 🧸 Mini-Me Totem
description: Your Adventures, Now With a Sidekick
body:
![Title](https://nottobla.me/resource-packs/minimetotem/banner.png)

**🧸 Mini-Me Totem** is a resource pack that replaces the Totem of Undying with a small chibi version of your Minecraft skin. ### Manual Setup 1. Download your Minecraft skin (e.g., from [NameMC](https://namemc.com) or [MinecraftSkins](https://minecraftskins.com)). 2. Replace the file at: - `assets/minecraft/textures/item/totem_of_undying.png` (for 1.13+) - or `assets/minecraft/textures/item/totem.png` (for versions below 1.13) 3. Save and load the pack in Minecraft. ### Web Generator 1. Enter your Minecraft username 2. Choose the version you need 3. Download the file and insert it into your `resourcepacks` folder ### [Open Mini-Me Totem Generator](https://www.nottobla.me/resource-packs/minimetotem/)

For help or bug reports, join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/2kprrpbDfK).
License 🧸 Mini-Me Totem is © NotToBlame. You are permitted to: - ✅ Use in modpacks **if downloaded from official sources** (Modrinth, CurseForge) - ✅ Create and publish **addon packs** (as long as no original files are included) - ✅ Make **personal edits** (not for redistribution) You may **not**: - ❌ Reupload or redistribute this pack or its assets - ❌ Include original files in your own uploads or forks - ❌ Use the pack commercially without explicit permission [Read the full license →](https://www.nottobla.me/assets/license.md)
